pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly checks for tiddler "CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview"
export_result.sh and verifier.py expect the macro to use "CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs" and for the tabs to have "CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs" tag
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the default tab "CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol" inside the tabs macro

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the creation of synthetic TiddlyWiki content. Verified requirements are explicitly checked in evaluation scripts (export_result.sh and verifier.py), confirming the creation of the main tiddler titled "CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview", tabs categorized with the tag "CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs", and setting the default tab to "CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol".
